person.name: Sir William Calthorpe
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Created a Knight of the Bath on Ascension day, 26th May 1465, by King Edward IV at the Tower of London on the Coronation of his Queen, Elizabeth.

Father Sir John Calthorpe b. c 1380, d. 1415

Mother Amy (Amice) Wythe d. a 1440

Sir William Calthorpe, Sheriff of Norfolk & Suffolk was born on 30 January 1410 at Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England. He married Elizabeth Grey, daughter of Sir Reynold (Reginald) Grey, 3rd Baron Grey of Ruthyn, Governor of Ireland, Lord of Hastings & Wexford and Joan Astley, circa 1430; They had 2 sons (Sir John; & William) and 1 daughter (Anne, wife of William Gurney).

Sir William Calthorpe, Sheriff of Norfolk & Suffolk married Elizabeth Stapleton, daughter of Sir Myles Stapleton, Sheriff of Norfolk & Suffolk, Lord Ingham and Katherine de la Pole, before 7 March 1464; They had 3 sons (Sir Francis; John; & Edward) and 2 daughters (Anne, wife of Robert Drury; & Elizabeth, wife of Francis Hasilden). Sir William Calthorpe, Sheriff of Norfolk & Suffolk left a will on 31 May 1494; Requested burial in the White Friars, Norwich, Norfolk. He died on 15 November 1494 at Norwich, Norfolk, England, at age 84. His estate was probated on 23 May 1495.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Calthorpe於1410年1月30日出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，他的父親Sir John Calthorpe32歲，母親Amy de Wythe20歲。他於大約1431年與Elizabeth de Grey在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1469年被列為sheriff of norfolk and suffolk。他去世於1494年11月15日在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年84歲。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Calthorpe was born on 30 January 1410, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Calthorpe, was 32 and his mother, Amy de Wythe, was 20. He married Elizabeth de Grey about 1431, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1469, his occupation is listed as sheriff of norfolk and suffolk. He died on 15 November 1494, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Calthorpe est né le 30 janvier 1410, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Calthorpe, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Amy de Wythe, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Grey environ 1431, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1469, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of norfolk and suffolk. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1494, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.Burnham Thorpe,Norfolk,England: Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Calthorpe am 30. Januar 1410 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Calthorpe 32 und seine Mutter Amy de Wythe 20. Er hat um 1431 in Wales, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1469 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of norfolk and suffolk aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. November 1494 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Calthorpeが1410年1月30日にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父Sir John Calthorpeは32歳，母Amy de Wytheは20歳であった。約1431年にイギリスウェールズでElizabeth de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1469年，職業はsheriff of norfolk and suffolkと記録されている。彼は1494年11月15日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Calthorpe(이)가 1410년 1월 30일 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Calthorpe(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy de Wythe(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1431년 영국 웨일스에서 Elizabeth de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1469년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of norfolk and suffolk이었다. 그는 1494년 11월 15일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Calthorpe nasceu em 30 de janeiro de 1410, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Calthorpe, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Amy de Wythe, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Grey aproximadamente 1431, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1469, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of norfolk and suffolk. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1494, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Calthorpe родился 30 января 1410 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Calthorpe было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Amy de Wythe, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Grey около 1431 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1469 году он работал по профессии sheriff of norfolk and suffolk. Он умер 15 ноября 1494 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.
